sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114752" key="xronola/bon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρονολάβον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for measuring time,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.71</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξ ὑδρολογίου -ου</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
